channel.title: Resilience on Ronald's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Resilience on Ronald's Blog

item.title: Implement Failover in API Management with a Load-balanced Pool
item.description: In this post, I’ll show you how to implement (regional) failover in Azure API Management using priority-based load-balanced pools, backend circuit breakers and retry policies. The setup sends traffic to the local backend by default and automatically fails over to the secondary backend when the primary backend becomes unavailable.
